abilities.name: 틀깨기
abilities.description: 특성에 관계없이 상대에게 기술을 쓸 수 있다.

flavorTexts.text: When Veluza discards unnecessary flesh, its mind becomes honed and its psychic power increases. The spare flesh has a mild but delicious flavor.
Veluza has excellent regenerative capabilities. It sheds spare flesh from its body to boost its agility, then charges at its prey.
